title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・きっと、また

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week is victorious against Seiun Sky at
the grand event, the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, their race toward the future doesn't end
here. The two runners vow to battle again as they
take their respective paths.
